title: High Performance applications with C++
description: This certification validates advanced proficiency in low-level systems programming and concurrent architecture. It covers the implementation of thread-safe data structures, sophisticated synchronization primitives (Mutex, Semaphores, RWLocks), and the design of asynchronous task-execution systems. I demonstrated these skills by developing a custom thread pool that leverages modern C++ memory models and future/promise patterns for high-throughput processing.
